MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAY-23-2013 IN 206, DEFENDANT MASSIVEMEDIA, INC.'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. JOSHUA WHITE APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFFS. KASEY TOWNSEND APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT MASSIVEMEDIA, INC. SEAN BARRY APPEARING FOR DEFENDANTS RAMAK HAMZEH & FATEMEH HAJIHA. AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT GRANTED DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE. THE TRIAL DATE OF 6/17/13 IS CONTINUED TO 7/15/13 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERED THAT THERE SHALL BE NO FURTHER CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL DATE BASED ON SCHEDULE CONFLICTS OF COUNSEL. DISCOVERY WILL REMAIN CLOSED WITH THE EXCEPTION OF THE ISSUE RELATING TO PLAINTIFF'S MEDICAL TREATMENT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT MASSIVEMEDIA, INCORPORATED'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is Denied. There are triable issue regarding whether Defendant Hamzeh was an employee of Defendant Massivemedia, Inc. at the time the accident occurred. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.)
